title: Saraburi Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Saraburi with a Z-Score of +3.00. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Saraburi has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperature is causing high energy demand with CDD at 9.5 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 85% and wind speed is 1.8 km/h, making the situation worse.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave measures immediately.
